stories.headline: Japan relaxes royal succession rules
stories.description: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.

stories.headline: Germany repeats call for EU force to replace UN peacekeepers in Lebanon
stories.description: Berlin warns against a ‘security vacuum’ in Lebanon’s south once UNIFIL mandate expires at year’s end.

stories.headline: What you need to know as Andy Burnham set to become UK prime minister
stories.description: He is set to replace Sir Keir Starmer as the UK's PM on Monday after winning Labour's leadership race.

stories.headline: US attacks southern Iran, as Tehran hits Gulf countries: What’s the latest?
stories.description: Iran struck Bahrain, Qatar, Oman, Jordan and Syria in retaliation for US strikes.

stories.headline: Why is Pakistan’s Sindh province facing a major child HIV outbreak?
stories.description: The latest outbreak linked to a Karachi hospital is the newest in a series that experts say reflects systemic failures.
